brand_identity.name: Texas Business Healthcare Association
brand_identity.target_audience: Healthcare professionals, business students, university chapters

theme.description: Clean white backgrounds with deep navy authority and subtle silver detailing. High contrast for readability, with gold accents for prestige.

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and card headers. Letter-spacing tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, lists, and navigational elements.

mono.usage: Use for technical data, stats, or tags.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use 'Bento' grids (uneven spans) for committees and projects to avoid visual monotony.
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use 'py-20' or 'py-24' for section vertical padding. 'gap-8' minimum for grids.
layout_strategy.border_radius: rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-full for buttons.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-slate-100 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

news_ticker.style: bg-primary text-white py-2 text-sm font-medium overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap

committees.items: Mix of large (featured) and small (list) cards.

gallery.features: Lightbox on click, Filter tabs at top.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons (Chevron, Menu, User, MapPin, etc).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Navy text on White meets WCAG AA.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-primary) on all interactive elements.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable complex animations if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

do_not_use: Center alignment for heavy text blocks
must_do: Ensure mobile responsiveness (hamburger menu on sm screens)
Use semantic HTML (section, article, nav, header, footer)

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind colors with the Navy/Silver palette.
3. Create the layout skeleton with a fixed Navbar and Footer.
5. Build the 'Admin Panel' layout separately (sidebar navigation).
6. Use 'shadcn/ui' components for complex interactions (Accordion, Dialog, Tabs).
7. Ensure the Logo is prominent in the Header.
8. Create 'Committee' and 'Project' data structures (mock data initially).
